title: Model Session Drawings
content: Charcoal and pencil drawings from live model sessions. Some are longer poses with more detail and shading; others are quick gesture studies, a few minutes each. Most figures have no facial detail — the focus stays on posture and proportion.

images.caption: Expressive Charcoal Drawing: Figure from behind, heavy charcoal, strong contrast between light and shadow.
Reclining Nude: Longer pose, three-quarters view, crosshatching for depth and muscle definition.
Triad of Gestural Poses: Three quick sketches — seated and standing figures, light shading, minimal line work.
Varying Poses of Female Forms: Three gestural studies, each a different pose. Clean lines, light shading on proportion and curve.
Dynamic Gestures: Four quick poses — standing, seated, leaning, reclining. Fluid lines, very little shading.
